'''鈭歵h-ng-zh''' ('''thangazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preapply|preapply]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preapply|preapply]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-ng-zh
|-
! Lemma
| thangazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thangazhithi|thangazhithi]] || [[word:thangazhiji|thangazhiji]] || [[word:thangazhishi|thangazhishi]] || [[word:thangazhi|thangazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thangazhuthuth|thangazhuthuth]] || [[word:thangazhujuj|thangazhujuj]] || [[word:thangazhushush|thangazhushush]] || [[word:thangazh|thangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangazhuthu|thangazhuthu]] || [[word:thangazhuju|thangazhuju]] || [[word:thangazhushu|thangazhushu]] || [[word:thangazhu|thangazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangazhufuth|thangazhufuth]] || [[word:thangazhufuj|thangazhufuj]] || [[word:thangazhufush|thangazhufush]] || [[word:thangazhuf|thangazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thangazhethe|thangazhethe]] || [[word:thangazheje|thangazheje]] || [[word:thangazheshe|thangazheshe]] || [[word:thangazhe|thangazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thangazhothoth|thangazhothoth]] || [[word:thangazhojoj|thangazhojoj]] || [[word:thangazhoshosh|thangazhoshosh]] || [[word:thangazh|thangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangazhotho|thangazhotho]] || [[word:thangazhojo|thangazhojo]] || [[word:thangazhosho|thangazhosho]] || [[word:thangazho|thangazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangazhofoth|thangazhofoth]] || [[word:thangazhofoj|thangazhofoj]] || [[word:thangazhofosh|thangazhofosh]] || [[word:thangazhof|thangazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thangazh忙th忙|thangazh忙th忙]] || [[word:thangazh忙j忙|thangazh忙j忙]] || [[word:thangazh忙sh忙|thangazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:thangazh忙|thangazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thangazhathath|thangazhathath]] || [[word:thangazhajaj|thangazhajaj]] || [[word:thangazhashash|thangazhashash]] || [[word:thangazh|thangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangazhatha|thangazhatha]] || [[word:thangazhaja|thangazhaja]] || [[word:thangazhasha|thangazhasha]] || [[word:thangazha|thangazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangazhafath|thangazhafath]] || [[word:thangazhafaj|thangazhafaj]] || [[word:thangazhafash|thangazhafash]] || [[word:thangazhaf|thangazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thangazhasha|thangazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothangazhasha|gothangazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithangazhasha|gokithangazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thangazhn眉sha|thangazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothangazhnkn眉sha|gothangazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithangazhn眉sha|gokithangazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thangazhsh毛sha|thangazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothangazhnksh毛sha|gothangazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithangazhsh毛sha|gokithangazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thangazhrosha|thangazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothangazhnkrosha|gothangazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithangazhrosha|gokithangazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thangazhmusha|thangazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothangazhnkmusha|gothangazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithangazhmusha|gokithangazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thangazhsherasha|thangazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothangazhnksherasha|gothangazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithangazhsherasha|gokithangazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thangazhngasha|thangazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothangazhnkngasha|gothangazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithangazhngasha|gokithangazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thangazhyasha|thangazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothangazhnkyasha|gothangazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithangazhyasha|gokithangazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thangazhyamasha|thangazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothangazhnkyamasha|gothangazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithangazhyamasha|gokithangazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thangazhn眉sh毛sha|thangazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothangazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gothangazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithangazhn眉sh毛sha|gokithangazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thangazhn眉rosha|thangazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothangazhnkn眉rosha|gothangazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithangazhn眉rosha|gokithangazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thangazhn眉musha|thangazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothangazhnkn眉musha|gothangazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithangazhn眉musha|gokithangazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thangazhsh毛n眉sha|thangazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothangazhnksh毛n眉sha|gothangazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithangazhsh毛n眉sha|gokithangazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thangazhsh毛rosha|thangazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothangazhnksh毛rosha|gothangazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithangazhsh毛rosha|gokithangazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thangazhsh毛musha|thangazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothangazhnksh毛musha|gothangazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithangazhsh毛musha|gokithangazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thangazhron眉sha|thangazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothangazhnkron眉sha|gothangazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithangazhron眉sha|gokithangazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thangazhrosh毛sha|thangazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothangazhnkrosh毛sha|gothangazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithangazhrosh毛sha|gokithangazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thangazhromusha|thangazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothangazhnkromusha|gothangazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithangazhromusha|gokithangazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thangazhmun眉sha|thangazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothangazhnkmun眉sha|gothangazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithangazhmun眉sha|gokithangazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thangazhmush毛sha|thangazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothangazhnkmush毛sha|gothangazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithangazhmush毛sha|gokithangazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thangazhmurosha|thangazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothangazhnkmurosha|gothangazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithangazhmurosha|gokithangazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thangazh|thangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙ng忙zh|th忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothangazh|hothangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙ng忙zh|hoth忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothangazh|hohothangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙ng忙zh|hohoth忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thangazh|n眉thangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙ng忙zh|n眉th忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thangazh|n眉n眉thangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙ng忙zh|n眉n眉th忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thangazh|n茂thangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙ng忙zh|n茂th忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thangazh|n茂n茂thangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙ng忙zh|n茂n茂th忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthangazh|luthangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙ng忙zh|luth忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthangazh|luluthangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙ng忙zh|luluth忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithangazh|lithangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙ng忙zh|lith忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithangazh|lilithangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙ng忙zh|lilith忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothangazh|kothangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙ng忙zh|koth忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothangazh|kokothangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙ng忙zh|kokoth忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethangazh|kethangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙ng忙zh|keth忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethangazh|kekethangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙ng忙zh|keketh忙ng忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
